## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated (`pnpm test`)
- [ ] Docs updated (README / inline JSDoc) where the public API changed
- [ ] No breaking change — OR noted as `BREAKING CHANGE:` in commit body
- [ ] `pnpm lint && pnpm test` passes locally
- [ ] Conventional Commit message (commitlint will reject otherwise)
